mappings.rationaleAI: The Spanish Civil War covers Franco's military uprising, German and Italian intervention, and the establishment of the Franco dictatorship, directly matching A.5.a.i on the Civil War, foreign intervention, and Franco's victory.
Hindenburg's role as Weimar Republic president and his appointment of Hitler as chancellor directly match A.3.a.i on the Weimar Republic and the rise of National Socialists to power.
Lenin's Bolshevik seizure of power, War Communism, and the New Economic Policy directly match B.1.a.i on the October Revolution, civil war, and the rise of Stalin.
Rosa Luxemburg's role in the Spartacist League and murder during the 1919 German revolution relates to A.3.a.i on the Weimar Republic's early period and challenges from left and right.
Bohemia's Czech national revival and formation of Czechoslovakia directly relate to B.2.c on Czechoslovakia's establishment under Masaryk and subsequent developments.
Yeats and Irish politics cover the Easter Rising, War of Independence, Civil War, and the Irish Free State, directly matching A.1.b.i on division of Ireland and establishment of the Irish Free State.
The Cultural Revolution is about the Soviet Union's ideological rival China, not European history. Reject.
